# Morgan Richards Garage Ltd

> Family-run garage in Charlton SE7, SE London, established 1994. MOT testing (classes 1, 2, 4, 5 & 7), car servicing, diagnostics, tyres, brakes, air conditioning, exhausts, and EV & hybrid specialists. IMI certified and Nexdrive approved for electric vehicles. Rated 4.8 stars across 193 Google reviews and 4.9 on Yell.

## Services

- [MOT Testing & Servicing](https://www.morganrichardsgaragecharlton.co.uk/#services)
- [EV & Hybrid Specialists](https://www.morganrichardsgaragecharlton.co.uk/#services)
- [Diagnostics & Repairs](https://www.morganrichardsgaragecharlton.co.uk/#services)
- [Tyres & Brakes](https://www.morganrichardsgaragecharlton.co.uk/#services)
- [Air Conditioning](https://www.morganrichardsgaragecharlton.co.uk/#services)

## Contact & Location

- **Phone:** 020 8854 2550
- **Alternative:** 020 8854 5791
- **Address:** Unit 12 Anchorage Point, Anchor & Hope Lane, Charlton SE7 7SQ
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00am–6:00pm, Saturday 9:00am–1:00pm, Sunday closed

## Areas Served

Charlton, Greenwich, Woolwich, Bexley, Eltham, Sidcup, Lewisham, Thamesmead, Erith, Plumstead and surrounding SE London.

## Credentials

- IMI certified for EV and hybrid servicing
- Nexdrive approved
- AutoCare registered member
- 1,500+ Regit reviews
- 4.8 Google rating (193 reviews)
